prompt: Looking at big.log, how many DISTINCT error types appear (the word after 'ERROR'), and which error type is most frequent?

treatment.script: echo 'error type counts:'; grep -oE 'ERROR [A-Za-z]+' fixtures/big.log | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn; echo 'distinct types:'; grep -oE 'ERROR [A-Za-z]+' fixtures/big.log | sed 's/ERROR //' | sort -u
